name: raid_item_upgrade
description: Phase 5 risk/reward: chest items walk Equipment.upgrade per raids_completed. Set raids_completed=2 → ChestBuildingW base 'leather_jerkin' should upgrade to 'iron_plate'. Trigger raid via M+2, teleport champion onto W chest. Final inventory holds 'iron_plate' (not 'leather_jerkin').

inputs.note: drop onto ChestBuildingW (W has leather_jerkin → iron_plate at tier 2)
